description: Phase 4.1 rebaseline failure-path and emergency-relock fixture analysis

failure_paths_analyzed.trigger: One of Lock/Unlock/LockStatus/Manifest/Integrity scripts missing from ToolsRoot
failure_paths_analyzed.behavior: Returns FAILED with completed_utc, does not attempt unlock or relock

failure_paths_analyzed.trigger: Unlock returns one or more Status=FAILED results
failure_paths_analyzed.behavior: Returns FAILED with completed_utc, does not proceed to update action
failure_paths_analyzed.rationale: Files were never unlocked, so no exposure

failure_paths_analyzed.emergency_relock_behavior: Calls Lock-HeliosProtectedFiles with same params; on success: RECOVERED step; on failure: FAILED step + Write-Error CRITICAL

failure_paths_analyzed.trigger: Lock returns one or more Status=FAILED results
failure_paths_analyzed.note: PARTIAL_RELOCK is the most dangerous terminal state — some files may be exposed

expected_sequence: Emergency: emergency_relock — RECOVERED (if Lock succeeds) or FAILED (if Lock fails)

result: PASS — all 8 terminal paths analyzed, all set completed_utc, emergency relock triggers correctly on update/manifest failure
